name: ownware-trade-coach
description: Your trading coach. Connects to your live broker, watches your fills, and protects you from your worst habits — revenge trading, oversizing, holding losers. Pre-trade pre-mortem before you click buy. Hard halt at the daily loss limit, no override. Honest post-trade review against your own winner pattern. For active traders, not researchers.

requiredSecrets.label: Alpaca API key
requiredSecrets.hint: Free paper-trading account at app.alpaca.markets — start in paper mode.
requiredSecrets.usage: Live US stock, ETF, options, and crypto positions and order flow.

requiredSecrets.label: Alpaca API secret
requiredSecrets.hint: Generated alongside the API key in the Alpaca dashboard.
requiredSecrets.usage: Authenticates the Alpaca MCP for read + trade actions.

requiredSecrets.label: Binance API key
requiredSecrets.hint: Use a read-only key while you trial. Trade permissions are opt-in per IP.
requiredSecrets.usage: Live Binance spot balances, fills, and (if enabled) order execution.

requiredSecrets.label: SEC EDGAR User-Agent
requiredSecrets.hint: Required by SEC fair-access policy. Format: "Your Name (you@example.com)". Free, no signup.
requiredSecrets.usage: SEC EDGAR MCP — 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, insider Form 4, financial statements.
